items.text_for_match: Arsenal to raise ticket prices & add safe standing Arsenal will increase season ticket prices by 3.9% and introduce safe standing at Emirates Stadium from next season. Arsenal will increase season ticket prices by 3.9% and introduce safe standing at Emirates Stadium from next season.

items.ja: 'We really messed up' - does European football need more balance?
items.en: 'We really messed up' - does European football need more balance?
items.text_for_match: 'We really messed up' - does European football need more balance? One set of clubs dominate the Champions League, another win their domestic title every year but cannot compete - does European football have a problem?
